classification.notes: Three themed panels (blue Data Source, orange TransitBench, green TransitLM). Structural shells, tables, stop-sequence glyphs and all readable labels are SVG; pictorial route graphics, screenshots, maps and logos are cropped raster assets.

edge_check.note: border-touch allowed by model-led crop policy
